title: Tensura Boost Regen Magicule
description: A datapack that makes you regen Magicule scale on magicule max.
body:
Datapack for Tensura: Reincarnated

Very light double datapack that increase Magicule
You have a notification for every level

The calculation is based about your max Magicule for the datapack Magicule 
Actually is based on your [Max x 0.001%].
(Thats work like the Magicule Absorption I for each level)

Example: You have 1.000.000, which gives you +10 Magic. So you have as base regen for Magicule 11 ( 10 level + 1 default ).

PS : Remember, that's scale on the base regeneration given by the biome; Hell Dimension is pretty cool with it ^^ 

It functions using a scoreboard.
